question: On standard multi-hop QA datasets (HotpotQA distractor / 2WikiMultiHop / MuSiQue), does OKF entity-graph recall (okf.extract.multi_hop_recall, expanding through a shared-entity index) recall the gold supporting paragraphs better than a vector-only baseline (agent.lexical_embed cosine) over the SAME candidate pool?
constructs: supporting-paragraph Recall@K (fraction of an item's gold paragraphs retrieved in top-K)
graph-minus-vector recall lift (paired per item; positive = the entity graph helps)
multi-hop necessity (lift concentrated at small K, where a vector-only view misses the bridged paragraph)
primaryMetric: graph_multihop Recall@2 minus vector_only Recall@2, paired per question
arms: vector_only (lexical_embed cosine rank over the candidate paragraphs — the baseline)
graph_multihop (entity-index expansion + provenance-floor recall over the same pool)
decontam: questions asserted disjoint from every committed training corpus via tools/assert_decontam primitives before any number is reported

entityBackend.farmUpgrade: real NER/LLM backend via --ner-backend (what SAG uses); graph machinery unchanged

goCriteria: graph_multihop Recall@2 - vector_only Recall@2 > 0 with a paired 95% CI excluding 0, over >= 3 dataset slices/seeds
decontam CLEAN (zero question leakage into training corpora)
no regression at higher K (graph Recall@10 >= vector Recall@10 - 0.02)
provenanceNote: third-party web paragraphs carry NO provenance labels, so provenance-faithfulness (the wiki/-only contribution) is NOT measured here; this experiment isolates the recall lift only.
workflow: .github/workflows/okf-multihop-recall.yml (manual workflow_dispatch; downloads HotpotQA dev-distractor, runs both arms with a fail-closed decontam gate, uploads the report artifact; does not auto-commit)
decontamNote: a scan over zero training prompts is VACUOUS and is NOT a clean pass (the harness flags `vacuous` and fails closed); a real GO needs the corpora present and unlocked
execution: farm/CI only — datasets are not committed and there is no in-session network; dispatch the workflow or pass --data
